spec.precondition: valid(galloc) && valid(graph) && (null(node_buffer_ids) || valid(node_buffer_ids)) && (null(leaf_buffer_ids) || valid(leaf_buffer_ids)) && galloc->n_buffers > 0 && valid_range(galloc->bufts, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && valid_range(galloc->buffers, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && valid_range(galloc->buf_tallocs, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && (node_buffer_ids == NULL || (graph->n_nodes > 0 && valid_range(node_buffer_ids, 0, graph->n_nodes) && forall i in 0..graph->n_nodes: node_buffer_ids[i] >= 0 && node_buffer_ids[i] < galloc->n_buffers)) && (leaf_buffer_ids == NULL || (graph->n_leafs > 0 && valid_range(leaf_buffer_ids, 0, graph->n_leafs) && forall i in 0..graph->n_leafs: leaf_buffer_ids[i] >= 0 && leaf_buffer_ids[i] < galloc->n_buffers))
